languages.text: Торговый Патент возвращен в охраняемые палаты и вновь освящен кровью {name} фон Валанциус, законн{mf|ого|ой} нынешне{mf|го|й} держател{mf|я|ьницы}.
The Warrant of Trade has been returned to its protected chamber and re-consecrated with the blood of {name} von Valancius, its current rightful bearer.
languages.original_text: Торговый Патент возвращен в охраняемые палаты и вновь освящен кровью {name} фон Валанциус, законн{mf|ого|ой} нынешне{mf|го|й} держател{mf|я|ьницы}.

traits.locale_text: The Warrant of Trade has been returned to its protected chamber and re-consecrated with the blood of {name} von Valancius, its current rightful bearer.

languages.text: 貿易証は、保護された部屋に戻され、現在の正当な所持者である{name}・フォン・ヴァランシウスの血で再び神聖化された。
languages.original_text: The Warrant of Trade has been returned to its protected chamber and re-consecrated with the blood of {name} von Valancius, its current rightful bearer.

traits.locale_text: 貿易証は、保護された部屋に戻され、現在の正当な所持者である{name}・フォン・ヴァランシウスの血で再び神聖化された。

languages.text: La Patente de Comercio ha vuelto a su cámara protegida y reconsagrada con la sangre de {name} von Valancius, su actual titular.
languages.original_text: The Warrant of Trade has been returned to its protected chamber and re-consecrated with the blood of {name} von Valancius, its current rightful bearer.

traits.locale_text: La Patente de Comercio ha vuelto a su cámara protegida y reconsagrada con la sangre de {name} von Valancius, su actual titular.

languages.text: Der Handelsbrief befindet sich wieder in seiner geschützten Kammer und wurde mit dem Blut von {name} von Valancius, {mf|seinem rechtmäßigen Träger|seiner rechtmäßigen Trägerin} geweiht.
languages.original_text: The Warrant of Trade has been returned to its protected chamber and re-consecrated with the blood of {name} von Valancius, its current rightful bearer.

traits.locale_text: Der Handelsbrief befindet sich wieder in seiner geschützten Kammer und wurde mit dem Blut von {name} von Valancius, {mf|seinem rechtmäßigen Träger|seiner rechtmäßigen Trägerin} geweiht.

languages.text: Après avoir été reconsacrée avec le sang de {mf|son détenteur|sa détentrice} légitime, {name} von Valancius, la lettre de marque a regagné sa salle sacrée.
languages.original_text: The Warrant of Trade has been returned to its protected chamber and re-consecrated with the blood of {name} von Valancius, its current rightful bearer.

traits.locale_text: Après avoir été reconsacrée avec le sang de {mf|son détenteur|sa détentrice} légitime, {name} von Valancius, la lettre de marque a regagné sa salle sacrée.

languages.text: 贸易授状已被送回安保密室，并以其当前合法持有者——{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯之血重新祝圣。
languages.original_text: The Warrant of Trade has been returned to its protected chamber and re-consecrated with the blood of {name} von Valancius, its current rightful bearer.

traits.locale_text: 贸易授状已被送回安保密室，并以其当前合法持有者——{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯之血重新祝圣。

languages.text: Ticari Ruhsatname, korunaklı odasına geri döndürüldü ve şu anki meşru sahibi {name} von Valancius'un kanıyla yeniden kutsandı.
